mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clothing_goods_scene (goods_id, scene_id, add_time) VALUES (#{goodsId}, #{sceneId}, NOW())

INSERT INTO clothing_goods_scene (goods_id, scene_id, add_time) VALUES
(#{item.goodsId}, #{item.sceneId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM clothing_goods_scene WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, goods_id, scene_id, add_time FROM clothing_goods_scene WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId}
SELECT goods_id FROM clothing_goods_scene WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId}
